purpose: Authorize the SEJ-projected ASCII render kernel conveyor before any executable body is hand-authored.

canonicalNodes.statement: The kernel accepts a governed visualProjectionModel and fails closed on missing or malformed geometry.
The kernel emits a deterministic asciiRenderResult with rendered lines, line count, content hash, and completion posture.
The generated Node.js kernel source is resolver-materialized from the semantic kernel contract and projection manifest.
The generated tests prove deterministic rendering, fail-closed behavior, and bounded connector rules.
The projected kernel renders a minimal visual proof surface from a visualProjectionModel fixture and leaves a receipt.

rules.statement: No executable kernel body may introduce behavior not named in story, canonical spec, schemas, projection manifest, generated tests, and evidence receipts.
No hand-authored ASCII proof may be treated as governed evidence once resolver-backed generation exists.
